--- 
image: Silvia.jpeg 
description: Project Officer
about: 
  template: trestles 
  image-width: 10em 
  image-shape: round 
  links: 
    - text: Google scholar 
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=zbpD3LMAAAAJ&hl=en 
    - icon: orcid 
      text: ORCID 
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3671-0413 
    - text: CV 
      href: https://github.com/Silvia-pigeon/Website/blob/main/Silvia_Colombo_CV.pdf 
title: Dr. Silvia Colombo 
--- 

 

Silvia Colombo is currently a Project Officer for the Ecosystem Indicators Workflows (EIW) project initiative led by UNSW Sydney. She is also working at Macquarie University as a Research Assistant, helping to digitalize The Downing Herbarium collection to make specimens available to the public. Silvia recently completed a Ph.D. at the University of Melbourne on the evolution of the architecture of avian nests. Her background includes taxonomy, animal behaviour and navigation.
